name: Patisiran
summary: Lipid nanoparticle RNA interference therapeutic that lowers hepatic transthyretin production, with functional evidence in ATTR cardiac amyloidosis.
mechanism_summary: Suppresses hepatic TTR synthesis to reduce the supply of amyloid-forming transthyretin rather than directly removing existing deposits.

open_questions: How much cardiac benefit comes from lowered precursor supply versus aggregate regression
Whether functional effects persist and reduce harder clinical outcomes in ATTR-CM
